title: Acourtia dissiticeps

intro: Acourtia dissiticeps, commonly known as yerba anis or yerba de anís, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of colds and flu. The bioactive constituents of Acourtia dissiticeps include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
